title: FormatTemporalInstant<{min,max}>
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatTemporalInstant<{min,max}> (a Temporal.Instant branded with an instant range); the bounds constrain validation only, so the Instant serializes exactly like an unbranded one — toJSON() string in JSON, restored via Temporal.Instant.from().
notes: Branded Temporal.Instant: serialization uses the base Temporal kind (brand is validation-only); JSON carries the canonical instant string and restores via .from(), binary uses the Instant packing.
